description: You are a sustainability specialist at a NYC real estate firm performing the 2022 Local Law 84 energy benchmarking analysis for a portfolio of 25 office buildings in the open workbook 'energy_benchmarking.xlsx'. Complete the 'Energy_Analysis' sheet by calculating Total Site Energy (sum of all fuel types), Site EUI, Source Energy (using EPA ratios: Electricity 2.80, Gas 1.05, Oil 1.01, Steam 1.20), Source EUI, Energy Cost Intensity, EUI Category (Low <=50, Moderate <=100, High <=150, else Very High), ESTAR Eligibility (Eligible if Source EUI <= 148.1), Site EUI Rank, and Percent Above Portfolio Average. On the 'Portfolio_Summary' sheet, calculate portfolio totals, weighted averages for EUIs and cost intensity, counts for eligibility and categories, and identify the best and worst performing buildings by Site EUI. Save the updated workbook.
